landing.heroSubtitle: AI-powered Kanban that thinks with you. Prioritize smarter, estimate precisely, detect blockers before they block.

features.aiDesc: Axiom Intelligence scores and reprioritizes your backlog automatically based on context, dependencies, and team velocity.
features.analyticsDesc: Burndown charts, velocity tracking, and sprint health scores. Know exactly where your team stands at any moment.
features.realtimeDesc: Every drag, every status change, every comment appears instantly across your team. Powered by Pusher Channels.
features.designDesc: Focus is a finite resource. Axiom's interface is built to disappear, leaving only what matters most.
features.paletteDesc: Jump to any board, task, or setting instantly. No mouse required.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern access to and use of Axiom, an AI-powered Kanban platform. By creating an account or using Axiom, you agree to these Terms.

sections.heading: 1. Accepting these Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using Axiom you confirm that you can form a binding contract, that you accept these Terms, and that you agree to comply with them. If you use Axiom on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

sections.heading: 2. The Service
sections.body: Axiom provides Kanban boards, sprint analytics, real-time collaboration, and AI-assisted features under the Axiom Intelligence Engine. Features vary by plan, and Axiom may add, change, or remove functionality as the product evolves.

sections.heading: 3. Accounts
sections.body: You are responsible for the accuracy of your account information and for safeguarding your credentials. Notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorized access to your account.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable Use
sections.body: You agree not to misuse the service: no reverse engineering, no attempts to bypass rate limits or security controls, no uploading of unlawful content, and no use that disrupts other workspaces or infrastructure.

sections.heading: 5. Axiom Intelligence
sections.body: AI-generated suggestions — prioritization, estimation, blocker detection, and assignment — are decision support, not guaranteed outcomes. Review AI output before relying on it for critical decisions. Daily AI request limits apply per plan, as described in Settings → AI Quota.

sections.heading: 6. Subscriptions & Billing
sections.body: Paid plans are billed in advance on a recurring basis as described at axiom.app/pricing. You may cancel at any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual Property
sections.body: Axiom and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by the Axiom team. Content you create in your workspace — boards, tasks, comments — remains yours.

sections.heading: 8. Termination
sections.body: We may suspend or terminate access for violation of these Terms. You may stop using Axiom and delete your workspace at any time from Settings.

sections.heading: 9. Disclaimers
sections.body: Axiom is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including fitness for a particular purpose or non-infringement.

sections.heading: 10. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Axiom is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the service.

sections.heading: 11. Changes to these Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date; continued use after a change constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
sections.body: Questions about these Terms can be sent to legal@axiom.app.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what information Axiom collects, how it is used, and the choices available to you.

sections.heading: 1. Overview
sections.body: Axiom collects the minimum information needed to operate the product: account details, workspace content, and usage data that keeps boards fast and reliable.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.body: Account information (name, email, authentication provider), workspace content (boards, tasks, comments), and technical data (device, browser, log data) collected automatically when you use the service.

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: To provide and maintain the service, authenticate sign-in, power real-time collaboration, generate sprint analytics, and — where you invoke it — run Axiom Intelligence features.

sections.heading: 4. AI Processing
sections.body: Axiom Intelligence requests (prioritization, estimation, description generation, blocker detection, assignment) are processed by Groq (Llama 3.1), with Gemini Flash as a fallback provider. Task content relevant to the specific request is sent to these providers solely to generate that response; it is not used by Axiom to train models.

sections.heading: 5. Data Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell personal data. Information is shared only with service providers necessary to run Axiom — hosting, authentication, email delivery, and the AI providers described above — under contractual confidentiality obligations.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
sections.body: Workspace content is retained for as long as your workspace exists. Deleting your workspace or account removes associated content within a reasonable operational window.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
sections.body: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data. Requests can be made from Settings → Account or by contacting privacy@axiom.app.

sections.heading: 8. Cookies
sections.body: Axiom uses essential cookies for authentication and locale preference. No third-party advertising or tracking cookies are used.

sections.heading: 9. Security
sections.body: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Access to production systems is limited and audited. No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, but Axiom follows industry-standard practices to protect your data.

sections.heading: 10. Children's Privacy
sections.body: Axiom is not directed at children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from them.

sections.heading: 11. Changes to this Policy
sections.body: We may update this Policy from time to time. Material changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
sections.body: Questions about this Policy can be sent to privacy@axiom.app.

pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent tiers designed for elite engineering teams. Start free, upgrade when you need more.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For professional teams who need the full Axiom Intelligence stack.

plans.name: Team
plans.description: For scaling organizations with enterprise governance needs.

faq.a: Yes. Cancel from Settings → Billing. You keep your plan's access until the end of the current billing period.

faq.q: What happens when I hit a limit on the Free plan?
faq.a: You see a clear message with an upgrade prompt. No crashes, no data loss — just a hard stop on the blocked action.
The Free plan is a permanent tier — no time limit. Try Pro or Team features by upgrading and cancelling within the billing period.

ai.name: Axiom Intelligence
ai.quotaReached: Axiom Intelligence quota reached for today. Resets at midnight UTC.
ai.quotaPageDesc: Daily AI request limit for workspace
ai.infoLine1: The daily limit applies across all AI features — priority, estimation, description, blocker detection, and smart assignment.
ai.infoLine2: The counter resets automatically at midnight UTC every day.
ai.infoLine3: To adjust the limit, set the AI_DAILY_LIMIT environment variable and redeploy.

roadmapPage.subtitle: Where Axiom is headed. This is a living document — priorities evolve as we learn from real usage. Shipped items are locked; everything else is subject to change.

kanban-core.title: Core Kanban Board
kanban-core.description: Drag-and-drop columns and tasks, real-time sync via Pusher Channels.

ai-intelligence.title: Axiom Intelligence Engine
ai-intelligence.description: AI-powered prioritization, estimation, blocker detection, and smart assignment.

sprint-analytics.title: Sprint Analytics
sprint-analytics.description: Burndown charts, velocity tracking, AI-generated sprint health summaries.

dark-light.title: Dark & Light Mode
dark-light.description: Full design token system with next-themes and system preference detection.

cmd-palette.title: Command Palette
cmd-palette.description: Global ⌘K search across all tasks and boards with keyboard navigation.

premium-redesign.title: Premium Visual Redesign
premium-redesign.description: Glass-card design language, priority accent colors, and full French/English translation coverage across the entire app.

workspace-lifecycle.title: Workspace Archive & Trash
workspace-lifecycle.description: Archive a workspace or move it to Trash with a dedicated recovery page, instead of an instant, irreversible delete.

team-management.title: Team Management & Presence
team-management.description: Invite teammates, see real-time online/offline presence, and manage pending invitations from a dedicated team page.

toast-notifications.title: Toast Notification System
toast-notifications.description: Instant top-right feedback for every action, with matching entries in the notification bell and notification center.

webhooks.title: Webhooks & Public API
webhooks.description: REST API for external integrations, with API keys and docs at /docs/api.

pwa.title: Progressive Web App
pwa.description: Install Axiom on desktop or mobile and keep working offline with a dedicated fallback page.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Full French and English support across every screen, with a persistent locale switcher.

emails.title: Transactional Emails
emails.description: On-brand email notifications for workspace invitations and task assignments.

billing.title: Billing & Pricing Plans
billing.description: Stripe-powered subscription with Free, Pro, and Team tiers, plus an invoice history with downloads.

audit-log.title: Audit Log & Compliance
audit-log.description: Full activity audit trail for workspace owners, exportable as CSV.

push-notifications.title: Push Notifications
push-notifications.description: Browser push notifications for mentions, assignments, and sprint milestones, building on the installable PWA.

email-expansion.title: Expanded Email Notifications
email-expansion.description: Mention and sprint-milestone emails, extending the transactional email system already sending invitations and task assignments.

native-mobile.title: Native Mobile App
native-mobile.description: React Native app with offline board access and push notifications.

integrations.title: GitHub / Linear Integration
integrations.description: Sync tasks with GitHub Issues and Linear tickets bidirectionally.
